title: ResearchPilot AI
description: A scalable AI-powered research assistant that processes large volumes of documents using retrieval-augmented generation.
impact: Processed 1000+ documents and improved contextual response accuracy by 35%.
details: Built a RAG pipeline using semantic chunking and vector embeddings. Integrated LLaMA models for contextual generation and evaluated retrieval quality using precision-recall metrics.
challenges: Maintaining retrieval relevance and handling diverse document structures.
solutions: Optimized embedding strategies and semantic search pipelines.

title: PulseConnect
description: AI-driven blood demand forecasting and donor matching system.
impact: Reduced emergency response time by 40% and improved donor matching efficiency by 30%.
details: Designed a multi-agent system using real-time Firebase streams. Implemented ensemble regression models with hyperparameter tuning for accurate predictions.

title: StartupConnect
description: A full-stack platform that connects users with relevant opportunities using AI-based matching.
impact: Improved relevant job-role matching by 25% for 100+ users.
details: Built role-based authentication and implemented similarity-based matching algorithms for personalized recommendations.

title: DevOps CI/CD Automation
description: Automated CI/CD pipelines with integrated testing and monitoring.
impact: Improved deployment reliability and enabled early defect detection.
details: Integrated API validation scripts into CI/CD pipelines to ensure continuous system health and consistent deployments across environments.

title: MarketNest
description: A fashion marketplace platform with automated testing workflows.
impact: Ensured UI consistency and reliable user experience through automation.
details: Automated end-to-end user flows using Selenium WebDriver, covering form validation and navigation testing.

title: AI/ML Intern
details: Built an XGBoost airfare prediction model achieving 98.76% R². Developed a CNN-based deepfake detection system with 84.67% accuracy and 0.91 ROC-AUC on 10,000+ images.

title: AI/ML Intern
